steps.name: manifest-ingest
steps.summary: scripts/remediate.py — fingerprint()·manifest I/O(단독기록)·ingest(§4 매칭: 신규/진행형/재발/불일치/중복). status 커맨드. test_remediate.py: ingest·중복제거·ID안정·스키마거부. review-1 fixture 5 findings→unresolved

steps.name: triage
steps.summary: remediate.py apply-triage — triage.json 검증(evidence 필수·category XOR decision·unresolved만)·category→상태 라우팅(bug/contract/test→accepted, missing_feature→deferred, design_issue→requires-human)·history 기록. test: 라우팅·근거없음거부(원자성)·XOR·duplicate

steps.name: closure
steps.summary: remediate.py closure-packet(accepted만→cycle-N/closure-packet.md, 신규금지 안내)·ingest-closure(closure kind·신규ID거부·resolved는 accepted→resolved by:closure INV-3·still-open 유지). test: packet생성·resolved·still-open·신규거부·재발→requires-human(④)

steps.name: rule
steps.summary: remediate.py rule — G1~G6 hard gate(deferred 비차단)·score(자문·판정불변 INV-4)·deferredToImplementation·cycle cap 거부·ruling.json(readyForHandoff/handoff seam). test: Ready(①)·open blocker(②)·점수불가침(③)·requires-human(⑥)·fix미완료·캡(⑧)
